<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [plesk.com](https://www.plesk.com/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/plesk/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "plesk"
  dnsCredentials:
    # PLESK_PASSWORD: API password
    password: ""
    # PLESK_SERVER_BASE_URL: Base URL of the server (ex: https://plesk.myserver.com:8443)
    serverBaseURL: ""
    # PLESK_USERNAME: API username
    username: ""
    # PLESK_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # PLESK_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # PLESK_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # PLESK_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
